It wlill be dear from the above Slokas that Upac:haya houses are
not to be calculated from the Ascendant; it is a misconception -
otherwise, why would Maharishi spe<ify Lagnat upachaye. The 3nl. the
6'h. the l O'h and the 111h houses from the Ascendant are definitely
malefic and as such. how can they be houses of prosperity ? Rather.
they are houses of adversity.
